item.title: Small-Cap Segment Surges 1.38% Led by L T Foods; Breadth Indicators Signal Strong Market Momentum
item.description: The BSE Smallcap 250 index advanced by 1.38% on 5 March 2026, marking the small-cap segment as the standout performer among market capitalisation categories. This rally was underpinned by strong breadth, with 182 stocks advancing against 68 decliners, reflecting a healthy 2.68 times advance-decline ratio. Notably, L T Foods emerged as the top gainer with a robust 17.36% return, while Netweb Technologies lagged with a 6.02% decline. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Shines with 1.38% Gain Led by L T Foods; Breadth Remains Strong
item.description: The BSE Smallcap 250 index demonstrated notable resilience on 5 Mar 2026, advancing by 1.38% and outperforming broader market benchmarks. This rally was underpinned by strong breadth, with 182 stocks advancing against 68 decliners, reflecting a robust 2.68x advance-decline ratio. L T Foods emerged as the standout performer, surging 17.36%, while Netweb Technologies lagged with a 6.02% decline, highlighting the segment’s mixed but predominantly positive momentum. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Surges 1.38% Led by L T Foods; Market Breadth Strong
item.description: The BSE Smallcap 250 index advanced by 1.38% on 5 March 2026, outperforming broader market benchmarks as investor appetite for riskier assets strengthened. This rally was underpinned by strong breadth, with 182 stocks advancing against 68 decliners, reflecting a healthy 2.68x advance-decline ratio. Notably, L T Foods emerged as the top performer with a robust 17.36% return, while Netweb Technologies lagged with a 6.02% decline. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: TBO Tek Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: TBO Tek Ltd, a player in the Tour and Travel Related Services sector, has recently formed a Death Cross as its 50-day moving average (DMA) crossed below the 200-day moving average. This technical development is widely regarded as a bearish signal, indicating a possible deterioration in the stock’s trend and raising concerns about its long-term strength. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Gayatri Highways Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Gayatri Highways Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Transport Infrastructure sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term momentum and raising concerns about sustained weakness ahead. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Matrimony.com Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Matrimony.com Ltd, a player in the E-Retail/E-Commerce sector, has recently formed a Death Cross as its 50-day moving average (DMA) crossed below the 200-DMA, a classic technical indicator signalling a potential shift towards a bearish trend. This development, coupled with deteriorating fundamentals and weak price performance, suggests increasing downside risks for the stock in the near to medium term. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Prime Securities Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Prime Securities Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Non Banking Financial Company (NBFC) sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development suggests a potential shift towards a bearish trend, signalling a deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term momentum and raising concerns about sustained weakness ahead. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Lahoti Overseas Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Lahoti Overseas Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Trading & Distributors sector, has recently formed a Death Cross as its 50-day moving average (DMA) crossed below the 200-DMA. This technical development is widely regarded as a bearish signal, indicating a potential deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term trend and signalling caution for investors amid weakening momentum. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Timex Group India Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Timex Group India Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-DMA, signalling a potential shift towards a bearish trend. This development suggests a deterioration in the stock’s short- to medium-term momentum, raising concerns about sustained weakness in the Gems, Jewellery And Watches sector. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Infosys Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend

This development highlights a deterioration in the stock’s medium-term momentum and raises concerns about sustained weakness in the coming months. Time: 3 hours ago

This development signals a potential shift towards a sustained bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and long-term weakness in the stock’s price action. Time: 3 hours ago

This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s momentum and raising concerns about its near to medium-term price trajectory. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Fusion Finance Ltd Forms Golden Cross, Signalling Potential Bullish Breakout
item.description: Fusion Finance Ltd has recently experienced a significant technical event known as the Golden Cross, where its 50-day moving average (DMA) has crossed above the 200-day moving average. This development is widely regarded by market analysts as a bullish signal, indicating a potential trend reversal and a shift towards long-term upward momentum for the stock. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Viram Suvarn Ltd Forms Golden Cross, Signalling Potential Bullish Breakout
item.description: Viram Suvarn Ltd has recently witnessed a significant technical development as its 50-day moving average (DMA) crossed above the 200-day moving average, forming a classic Golden Cross. This event is widely regarded by market analysts as a bullish signal, indicating a potential long-term trend reversal and a shift in momentum favouring upward price movement. Time: 3 hours ago
